form.formComment: Good effort to score just five days ago over 318m at Manukau by 2.5 lengths in a Class 1 H. Makes plenty of appeal. Looks well placed and can measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to score just five days ago over 318m at Manukau by 2.5 lengths in a Class 1 H. Makes plenty of appeal. Looks well placed and can measure up again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Interference first turn unbalanced and fell.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 375m at this track. Prepared to just watch this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted rounding bend, gave ground latter stages and fell at lure.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th in a Class 1 on April 1 over 457m at this track behind Netherton Flyer beaten 7 lengths (26.60). Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.
